name: portfolio-aio
description: Dev-tooling manifest for the AI-Driven PM Portfolio. The published site is dependency-free Vanilla JS (Boring Technology); these are CI/dev tools only (lint, CSS lint, E2E). No runtime dependencies. Application code imports nothing from here.

scripts.lint: eslint main.js error-suppressor.js karte-init.js theme-init.js aio-guard.js sw.js js/page-meta.js js/pure-utils.js js/quiz/architecture-quiz-data.js js/quiz/aws-quiz-data.js js/quiz/pm-quiz-data.js js/quiz/quality-quiz-data.js js/router.js js/ui-components.js
scripts.lint:js: node --check main.js && node --check sw.js && node --check aio-guard.js && node --check error-suppressor.js && node --check theme-init.js && node --check karte-init.js && node --check js/page-meta.js && node --check js/pure-utils.js && node --check js/quiz/architecture-quiz-data.js && node --check js/quiz/aws-quiz-data.js && node --check js/quiz/pm-quiz-data.js && node --check js/quiz/quality-quiz-data.js && node --check js/router.js && node --check js/ui-components.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint:css && npm run lint && npm run lint:js
